verses.1: Taseen tilka ayatu alqurani wakitabin mubeenin
verses.3: Allatheena yuqeemoona alssalata wayutoona alzzakata wahum bialakhirati hum yooqinoona
verses.4: Inna allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati zayyanna lahum aAAmalahum fahum yaAAmahoona
verses.5: Olaika allatheena lahum sooo alAAathabi wahum fee alakhirati humu alakhsaroona
verses.6: Wainnaka latulaqqa alqurana min ladun hakeemin AAaleemin
verses.7: Ith qala moosa liahlihi innee anastu naran saateekum minha bikhabarin aw ateekum bishihabin qabasin laAAallakum tastaloona
verses.8: Falamma jaaha noodiya an boorika man fee alnnari waman hawlaha wasubhana Allahi rabbi alAAalameena
verses.9: Ya moosa innahu ana Allahu alAAazeezu alhakeemu
verses.10: Waalqi AAasaka falamma raaha tahtazzu kaannaha jannun walla mudbiran walam yuAAaqqib ya moosa la takhaf innee la yakhafu ladayya almursaloona
verses.11: Illa man thalama thumma baddala husnan baAAda sooin fainnee ghafoorun raheemun
verses.12: Waadkhil yadaka fee jaybika takhruj baydaa min ghayri sooin fee tisAAi ayatin ila firAAawna waqawmihi innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena
verses.13: Falamma jaathum ayatuna mubsiratan qaloo hatha sihrun mubeenun
verses.14: Wajahadoo biha waistayqanatha anfusuhum thulman waAAuluwwan faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu almufsideena
verses.15: Walaqad atayna dawooda wasulaymana AAilman waqala alhamdu lillahi allathee faddalana AAala katheerin min AAibadihi almumineena
verses.16: Wawaritha sulaymanu dawooda waqala ya ayyuha alnnasu AAullimna mantiqa alttayri waooteena min kulli shayin inna hatha lahuwa alfadlu almubeenu
verses.17: Wahushira lisulaymana junooduhu mina aljinni waalinsi waalttayri fahum yoozaAAoona
verses.18: Hatta itha ataw AAala wadi alnnamli qalat namlatun ya ayyuha alnnamlu odkhuloo masakinakum la yahtimannakum sulaymanu wajunooduhu wahum la yashAAuroona
verses.19: Fatabassama dahikan min qawliha waqala rabbi awziAAnee an ashkura niAAmataka allatee anAAamta AAalayya waAAala walidayya waan aAAmala salihan tardahu waadkhilnee birahmatika fee AAibadika alssaliheena
verses.20: Watafaqqada alttayra faqala ma liya la ara alhudhuda am kana mina alghaibeena
verses.21: LaoAAaththibannahu AAathaban shadeedan aw laathbahannahu aw layatiyannee bisultanin mubeenin
verses.22: Famakatha ghayra baAAeedin faqala ahattu bima lam tuhit bihi wajituka min sabain binabain yaqeenin
verses.23: Innee wajadtu imraatan tamlikuhum waootiyat min kulli shayin walaha AAarshun AAatheemun
verses.24: Wajadtuha waqawmaha yasjudoona lilshshamsi min dooni Allahi wazayyana lahumu alshshaytanu aAAmalahum fasaddahum AAani alssabeeli fahum la yahtadoona
verses.25: Alla yasjudoo lillahi allathee yukhriju alkhabaa fee alssamawati waalardi wayaAAlamu ma tukhfoona wama tuAAlinoona
verses.26: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa rabbu alAAarshi alAAatheemi
verses.27: Qala sananthuru asadaqta am kunta mina alkathibeena
verses.28: Ithhab bikitabee hatha faalqih ilayhim thumma tawalla AAanhum faonthur matha yarjiAAoona
verses.29: Qalat ya ayyuha almalao innee olqiya ilayya kitabun kareemun
verses.30: Innahu min sulaymana wainnahu bismi Allahi alrrahmani alrraheemi
verses.32: Qalat ya ayyuha almalao aftoonee fee amree ma kuntu qatiAAatan amran hatta tashhadoona
verses.33: Qaloo nahnu oloo quwwatin waoloo basin shadeedin waalamru ilayki faonthuree matha tamureena
verses.34: Qalat inna almulooka itha dakhaloo qaryatan afsadooha wajaAAaloo aAAizzata ahliha athillatan wakathalika yafAAaloona
verses.35: Wainnee mursilatun ilayhim bihadiyyatin fanathiratun bima yarjiAAu almursaloona
verses.36: Falamma jaa sulaymana qala atumiddoonani bimalin fama ataniya Allahu khayrun mimma atakum bal antum bihadiyyatikum tafrahoona
verses.37: IrjiAA ilayhim falanatiyannahum bijunoodin la qibala lahum biha walanukhrijannahum minha athillatan wahum saghiroona
verses.38: Qala ya ayyuha almalao ayyukum yateenee biAAarshiha qabla an yatoonee muslimeena
verses.39: Qala AAifreetun mina aljinni ana ateeka bihi qabla an taqooma min maqamika wainne AAalayhi laqawiyyun ameenun
verses.40: Qala allathee AAindahu AAilmun mina alkitabi ana ateeka bihi qabla an yartadda ilayka tarfuka falamma raahu mustaqirran AAindahu qala hatha min fadli rabbee liyabluwanee aashkuru am akfuru waman shakara fainnama yashkuru linafsihi waman kafara fainna rabbee ghaniyyun kareemun
verses.41: Qala nakkiroo laha AAarshaha nanthur atahtadee am takoonu mina allatheena la yahtadoona
verses.42: Falamma jaat qeela ahakatha AAarshuki qalat kaannahu huwa waooteena alAAilma min qabliha wakunna muslimeena
verses.43: Wasaddaha ma kanat taAAbudu min dooni Allahi innaha kanat min qawmin kafireena
verses.44: Qeela laha odkhulee alssarha falamma raathu hasibathu lujjatan wakashafat AAan saqayha qala innahu sarhun mumarradun min qawareera qalat rabbi innee thalamtu nafsee waaslamtu maAAa sulaymana lillahi rabbi alAAalameena
verses.45: Walaqad arsalna ila thamooda akhahum salihan ani oAAbudoo Allaha faitha hum fareeqani yakhtasimoona
verses.46: Qala ya qawmi lima tastaAAjiloona bialssayyiati qabla alhasanati lawla tastaghfiroona Allaha laAAallakum turhamoona
verses.47: Qaloo ittayyarna bika wabiman maAAaka qala tairukum AAinda Allahi bal antum qawmun tuftanoona
verses.48: Wakana fee almadeenati tisAAatu rahtin yufsidoona fee alardi wala yuslihoona
verses.49: Qaloo taqasamoo biAllahi lanubayyitannahu waahlahu thumma lanaqoolanna liwaliyyihi ma shahidna mahlika ahlihi wainna lasadiqoona
verses.50: Wamakaroo makran wamakarna makran wahum la yashAAuroona
verses.51: Faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu makrihim anna dammarnahum waqawmahum ajmaAAeena
verses.52: Fatilka buyootuhum khawiyatan bima thalamoo inna fee thalika laayatan liqawmin yaAAlamoona
verses.54: Walootan ith qala liqawmihi atatoona alfahishata waantum tubsiroona
verses.55: Ainnakum latatoona alrrijala shahwatan min dooni alnnisai bal antum qawmun tajhaloona
verses.56: Fama kana jawaba qawmihi illa an qaloo akhrijoo ala lootin min qaryatikum innahum onasun yatatahharoona
verses.57: Faanjaynahu waahlahu illa imraatahu qaddarnaha mina alghabireena
verses.58: Waamtarna AAalayhim mataran fasaa mataru almunthareena
verses.59: Quli alhamdu lillahi wasalamun AAala AAibadihi allatheena istafa allahu khayrun amma yushrikoona
verses.60: Amman khalaqa alssamawati waalarda waanzala lakum mina alssamai maan faanbatna bihi hadaiqa thata bahjatin ma kana lakum an tunbitoo shajaraha ailahun maAAa Allahi bal hum qawmun yaAAdiloona
verses.61: Amman jaAAala alarda qararan wajaAAala khilalaha anharan wajaAAala laha rawasiya wajaAAala bayna albahrayni hajizan ailahun maAAa Allahi bal aktharuhum la yaAAlamoona
verses.62: Amman yujeebu almudtarra itha daAAahu wayakshifu alssooa wayajAAalukum khulafaa alardi ailahun maAAa Allahi qaleelan ma tathakkaroona
verses.63: Amman yahdeekum fee thulumati albarri waalbahri waman yursilu alrriyaha bushran bayna yaday rahmatihi ailahun maAAa Allahi taAAala Allahu AAamma yushrikoona
verses.64: Amman yabdao alkhalqa thumma yuAAeeduhu waman yarzuqukum mina alssamai waalardi ailahun maAAa Allahi qul hatoo burhanakum in kuntum sadiqeena
verses.65: Qul la yaAAlamu man fee alssamawati waalardi alghayba illa Allahu wama yashAAuroona ayyana yubAAathoona
verses.66: Bali iddaraka AAilmuhum fee alakhirati bal hum fee shakkin minha bal hum minha AAamoona
verses.67: Waqala allatheena kafaroo aitha kunna turaban waabaona ainna lamukhrajoona
verses.68: Laqad wuAAidna hatha nahnu waabaona min qablu in hatha illa asateeru alawwaleena
verses.69: Qul seeroo fee alardi faonthuroo kayfa kana AAaqibatu almujrimeena
verses.70: Wala tahzan AAalayhim wala takun fee dayqin mimma yamkuroona
verses.71: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
verses.72: Qul AAasa an yakoona radifa lakum baAAdu allathee tastaAAjiloona
verses.73: Wainna rabbaka lathoo fadlin AAala alnnasi walakinna aktharahum la yashkuroona
verses.74: Wainna rabbaka layaAAlamu ma tukinnu sudooruhum wama yuAAlinoona
verses.75: Wama min ghaibatin fee alssamai waalardi illa fee kitabin mubeenin
verses.76: Inna hatha alqurana yaqussu AAala banee israeela akthara allathee hum feehi yakhtalifoona
verses.78: Inna rabbaka yaqdee baynahum bihukmihi wahuwa alAAazeezu alAAaleemu
verses.79: Fatawakkal AAala Allahi innaka AAala alhaqqi almubeeni
verses.80: Innaka la tusmiAAu almawta wala tusmiAAu alssumma aldduAAaa itha wallaw mudbireena
verses.81: Wama anta bihadee alAAumyi AAan dalalatihim in tusmiAAu illa man yuminu biayatina fahum muslimoona
verses.82: Waitha waqaAAa alqawlu AAalayhim akhrajna lahum dabbatan mina alardi tukallimuhum anna alnnasa kanoo biayatina la yooqinoona
verses.83: Wayawma nahshuru min kulli ommatin fawjan mimman yukaththibu biayatina fahum yoozaAAoona
verses.84: Hatta itha jaoo qala akaththabtum biayatee walam tuheetoo biha AAilman ammatha kuntum taAAmaloona
verses.85: WawaqaAAa alqawlu AAalayhim bima thalamoo fahum la yantiqoona
verses.86: Alam yaraw anna jaAAalna allayla liyaskunoo feehi waalnnahara mubsiran inna fee thalika laayatin liqawmin yuminoona
verses.87: Wayawma yunfakhu fee alssoori fafaziAAa man fee alssamawati waman fee alardi illa man shaa Allahu wakullun atawhu dakhireena
verses.88: Watara aljibala tahsabuha jamidatan wahiya tamurru marra alssahabi sunAAa Allahi allathee atqana kulla shayin innahu khabeerun bima tafAAaloona
verses.89: Man jaa bialhasanati falahu khayrun minha wahum min fazaAAin yawmaithin aminoona
verses.90: Waman jaa bialssayyiati fakubbat wujoohuhum fee alnnari hal tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona
verses.91: Innama omirtu an aAAbuda rabba hathihi albaldati allathee harramaha walahu kullu shayin waomirtu an akoona mina almuslimeena
verses.92: Waan atluwa alqurana famani ihtada fainnama yahtadee linafsihi waman dalla faqul innama ana mina almunthireena
verses.93: Waquli alhamdu lillahi sayureekum ayatihi fataAArifoonaha wama rabbuka bighafilin AAamma taAAmaloona
